name: news-reader-backend
description: Backend proxy, cache, reader extractor and notification server for the Android News Reader app.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/newsApi.js && node --check src/cache.js && node --check src/readerExtractor.js && node --check src/notification.js && node --check src/jobs/breakingNewsJob.js && node --check src/auth/otpService.js && node --check src/db/postgres.js && node --check src/storage/deviceStore.js
